ModMetaData.name: I got hit！
ModMetaData.author: Bee1Hell
ModMetaData.description:
Provides a lightweight combat reaction system based on vanilla mechanics, including adrenaline rush responses when hit, suppression effects when taking fire, and stagger/balance loss mechanics when sustaining severe damage. All mechanics are customizable in the Mod Settings.
提供了一个基于原版机制的轻量化战斗反应机制，包括被击中时的肾上腺素飙升反应，被击中时个体所产生的被压制效果，以及个体受到严重伤害时的失衡机制。所有机制都可在模组设置中自定义。
